introduction: Rahul, Faizal and Shalini embark on a journey to achieve their Bollywood dreams of becoming a Director, a DOP and a Producer respectively. This journey will test not just their friendship with each other, but more so their commitment to their dream. As their project, Henna, becomes a sought after script in Bollywood, the aspirations of Rahul, Faizal and Shalini come squarely up against the ambitious but ugly cesspool that is Bollywood. Our intrepid young filmmakers struggle to stay the course, despite the temptations of money, the heartbreak of rejection, and the risk of being cheated and deceived in the power play machinations of this film industry. As the season comes to a conclusion, it seems like everyone in Bollywood wants to make Henna. Will it be Rahul and Faizal, Shalini, Ramakant or the powerful Bollywood broker Kamini Canteenwala, that will prevail and make Henna? Who will be BHAK-ED... and who will prevail?
